properties.name: Meeting catalog
properties.description: List view of all meetings owned by the current author. Each row is a Meeting with key metadata and status. Auto-refreshes for transient statuses.

properties.name: Meeting detail
properties.description: Detail panel for a single meeting: shows Meeting + Recording metadata, current job error_reason on FAILED, and conditional action links (view transcript / review protocol / export PDF / delete).

properties.name: Confirm meeting deletion
properties.description: Confirmation dialog before destructive cascade-delete. Warns if a job is IN_PROGRESS.

properties.name: Upload meeting video
properties.description: File picker + language hint + optional title. Submits to server, which streams in chunks to EXT-04 with progress reporting; inline validation errors per BRQ-001/002/003.

properties.name: Transcript view
properties.description: Read-only view of the verbatim transcript with speaker labels and timestamps. Header shows transcript metadata. Provides a one-click Download action.

properties.name: Protocol editor
properties.description: Markdown editor for the meeting protocol with side-by-side rendered preview. Header shows version + edit_count + last_edited_at. Save action increments version and edit_count per BRQ-014/015.
